mappings.name: order_header
mappings.sql: INSERT INTO order_header(order_id, customer, total_amount) VALUES (?, ?, ?)

mappings.name: order_item
mappings.sql: INSERT INTO order_item(product, quantity, price, item_id, order_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

mappings.name: order_sub_item
mappings.sql: INSERT INTO order_sub_item(sub_product, sub_price, sub_item_id, item_id, order_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
